title: Cost-Efficient Multimodal LLM Inference via Cross-Tier GPU Heterogeneity
summary: arXiv:2603.12707v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Multimodal large language model (MLLM) inference splits into two phases with opposing hardware demands: vision encoding is compute-bound, while language generation is memory-bandwidth-bound. title: The First Healthcare Robotics Dataset and Foundational Physical AI Models for Healthcare Robotics
GTC 2026: Nvidia wants to swap robotics' data problem for a compute problem
summary: At GTC 2026, Nvidia is massively expanding its platform for physical AI. Starting in 2027, autonomous vehicles are set to drive through Los Angeles with Uber, industrial robots from FANUC and ABB are getting Nvidia brains, and new models aim to make humanoid robots more capable. title: Encyclopedia Britannica sues OpenAI for training on nearly 100,000 articles without permission
summary: Britannica sues OpenAI for almost 100,000 copied articles. At the same time, courts in Europe are arguing about whether AI models can "store" copyrighted works at all - with conflicting results. The article Encyclopedia Britannica sues OpenAI for training on nearly 100,000 articles without permission appeared first on The Decoder.

title: Models Are Applying to Be the Face of AI Scams
summary: Dozens of Telegram channels reviewed by WIRED include job listings for “AI face models.” The (mostly) women who land these gigs are likely being used to dupe victims out of their money.
